title: Keys, Trust & Attestation
description: How systems establish and prove trust with cryptography — signatures, PKI, hardware roots of trust, key ceremonies, attestation, and supply-chain integrity. A beginner-friendly field guide.
note: Throughout this guide, NVIDIA GPUs are the running hardware example. The concepts are not NVIDIA-specific — their platforms simply span the whole stack (secure boot, measured boot, per-device identity, remote attestation) and carry demanding hardware- and software-attestation requirements, which makes them a clean end-to-end illustration. The same patterns apply to TPM-based PCs, Apple's Secure Enclave, Google Titan, AWS Nitro, and Intel SGX/TDX — we just pick one vendor for consistency rather than switching examples on every page.
